healthy.description: The money plant leaf appears healthy with no visible signs of disease or stress. The colour and texture are normal.
healthy.cause: N/A — plant is in good condition.
healthy.treatment: Continue regular care. Water when the top inch of soil feels dry. Ensure indirect bright light and occasional wiping of leaves to remove dust.

unhealthy.description: The leaf shows signs of disease, pest damage, fungal infection, or physical stress. Common symptoms include brown spots, wilting, black edges, or lesions.
unhealthy.cause: Possible causes include fungal infections (e.g. root rot from overwatering), bacterial leaf spot, pest infestation (spider mites, mealybugs), or physical damage.
unhealthy.treatment:
1. Isolate the plant immediately to prevent spread.
2. Remove severely affected leaves with clean scissors.
3. If root rot is suspected, unpot the plant, trim black/mushy roots, and repot in fresh well-draining soil.
4. Apply a neem oil spray (5ml neem oil + 1 litre water + few drops dish soap) every 3 days for 2 weeks.
5. Avoid overwatering — let soil dry between waterings.

yellow.disease_name: Yellow Leaf — Nutrient or Watering Issue
yellow.description: The leaf has turned yellow, which typically indicates a nutrient deficiency, overwatering, underwatering, or too much direct sunlight.
yellow.cause: Most common causes: overwatering leading to root oxygen deprivation, nitrogen or magnesium deficiency, too much direct sun, or natural ageing of lower leaves.
yellow.treatment:
1. Check soil moisture — if soggy, reduce watering frequency immediately and ensure pot has drainage holes.
2. If soil is dry, water thoroughly and ensure consistent moisture.
3. Feed with a balanced liquid fertiliser (NPK 20-20-20) once every 2 weeks during growing season.
4. Move plant to a spot with bright indirect light — avoid harsh direct afternoon sun.
5. Remove fully yellow leaves to redirect plant energy.
medicine: Magnesium sulphate (Epsom salt) foliar spray for magnesium deficiency

not_a_leaf.description: The uploaded image does not appear to be a money plant leaf.
not_a_leaf.treatment: Please upload a clear, well-lit photograph of a money plant leaf and try again.
